notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel-rt SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 12 CVEs: CVE-2022-42896, CVE-2023-2163, CVE-2023-39191, CVE-2023-4207, CVE-2023-4208, and 7 more.
